ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the university is located */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of university (e.g., Ivy League, Public) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the university is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the university is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the university location */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was established */,
  "enrollment_size" INTEGER /* Current enrollment size of the university */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the university's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES university_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_universities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Northeastern, Southern) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the university type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the university type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the university the salary data belongs to */,
  "starting_median_salary" TEXT /* Starting median salary for the university */,
  "mid_career_median_salary" TEXT /* Mid-career median salary for the university */,
  "year_of_data" INTEGER /* Year the salary data pertains to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the salary data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the university data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the university data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the report is about */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name given to the report by the user */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report component */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the component belongs to */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of component (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "component_data" TEXT /* Data for the component */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_components_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
